---
title: "#microsoft-azure-collaboration"
format: gfm
---


## 2022-02-04

*13:00:06 - @Nitesh Turaga has joined the channel*
*13:00:43 - @Sergiy Getlin has joined the channel*
**Nitesh Turaga** (13:06:03):
> set the channel description: Open channel to talk about the collaboration between Bioconductor and Microsoft Azure

*13:06:22 - @Vince Carey has joined the channel*
*13:06:29 - @Alex Mahmoud has joined the channel*
*13:06:34 - @Marcel Ramos Pérez has joined the channel*
*13:06:39 - @Andres Wokaty has joined the channel*
*13:06:44 - @Lori Shepherd has joined the channel*
*13:06:48 - @Martin Morgan has joined the channel*

## 2022-05-24

*14:52:02 - @Erdal Cosgun has joined the channel*

## 2023-05-11

*12:45:41 - @Monica Valecha has joined the channel*

## 2023-05-18

*05:54:36 - @Oluwafemi Oyedele has joined the channel*

## 2024-02-09

**Marcel Ramos Pérez** (10:17:04):
> archived the channel
